analysis.name: Tutorial
analysis.summary: TUT是BNB Chain上的教育主题Meme币，近期因币安上线和社区热度上涨，但链上数据与项目描述存在矛盾（如DEX显示在Solana），需警惕风险。

recommendation.invalidation: 数据矛盾未澄清前逻辑失效

catalysts: 币安上线并开放交易对

latestNews.title: Binance Adds Tutorial (TUT) on Earn, Buy Crypto, Convert & Margin
latestNews.reason: 币安上线增加流动性和曝光度

latestNews.title: Binance Announced the First Batch of Vote to List Results and Will List TUT
latestNews.reason: 社区投票上币，显示社区支持

latestNews.title: What is TUT Crypto? TUT Price Analysis as Tutorial Token Blasts 120%
latestNews.reason: 价格分析文章，反映近期涨幅

fundamentals: 项目为BNB Chain上的Meme币，由教育教程开发者创建
最初在four.meme发行，流动性转移至PancakeSwap
DEX数据显示在Solana链上，与项目描述矛盾
marketRead: 成交量624万美元，相对市值较高，换手率约67%
DEX上流动性极低（仅3.99美元），与CMC数据严重不符
价格从ATH 0.1697美元下跌93.45%，当前0.0111美元
risks: 链上数据矛盾：DEX显示在Solana，但项目描述为BNB Chain
DEX流动性极低，存在操纵风险
Meme币高度投机，无实际价值支撑
新闻多为聚合页面，缺乏实质性进展
watchlist: 确认TUT实际所在链和真实流动性
币安上线后的交易量和价格走势
项目方是否发布新内容或合作
sourceNotes: CoinMarketCap和DexScreener数据不一致，需进一步核实
新闻来源多为聚合页面，缺乏一手信息

profile.name: Tutorial
profile.description: Tutorial is a token from a dev who made a tutorial on how to launch token on BNB chain 10 month ago, the OG Tutorial token was on testnet, so he decided to launch it on mainnet as a meme. The purpose of the project is to promote building on bsc and making useful education content. The project was originally created on four.meme and liquidity was transferred to pancakeswap as bonding curve criteria was met.
